task objective: Implement frontend updater timeout, active check generation tracking, hydration sequencing, and status string logic to fix updater stuck in Checking... state
design decisions: Introduced UPDATE_CHECK_UI_TIMEOUT_MS = 60000 limit for update checking state.
Track active check generation using activeCheckId ref to ignore late or stale update responses.
Show 'Check interrupted' status / 'Update check interrupted. Check again.' error message conditionally upon timeout.
Guarded context hydration sequencing via contextHydrated state to prevent race conditions during initial background checks.
Set skipInitialCheck ref to true when pending install hydration is active to skip the initial automatic check.
Added automaticCheckToggleHydrated ref to prevent the toggle effect from running a redundant update check during initial mount/hydration.
results: All tests (including the new static regression tests) passed successfully, and pnpm run typecheck completed successfully.
